name: Kevin Schaffer
message:
Anthony is a State Qualifier/Stare placer. Before most matches he gets sick and throws up. Says he is not nervous, but has to be nervous or have anxiety. 

He also plays travel baseball. I would like a coach that could potentially help here too. He does great in batting practice, but I think has anxiety when up to bat.

name: Shawnie Moody
message: Connor is a young wrestler with great potential. Something is holding him back. His analytical mind has him focused on the brackets, technique, and perfection. When something doesn’t go right on the mat, even if he is winning, he breaks down mentally and cannot recover. His striving for perfection diminishes his ability to see opportunities on the mat and adaptability.

name: Andy Breiner
message: My son, Jack, is an extremely talented kid. I say that as a coach and a parent. However, he was brought up to varsity as a 7th grader (part time) and a full time starter in 8th grade (New York). He is going to be a big guy. He wrestled 140 this year, 5'10" and is in a size 13 shoe. Wresting older kids has "killed" his mental state. To an extent, he is defeated before the match bc he has been told losing is ok and his time will come so often over the past 2 years. He is a practice room hero and o

name: Vincent  Geranio
job_function: Looking to get Mental Edge (no major issues)
message:
New Jersey

Rating from 1-10….my son is in between a 4-5

Aggressiveness, confidence during the match, defeated sometimes before the match even starts
